query:
SELECT 
  o.id, o.orderNumber, o.total,
  oi.id as item_id, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.totalPrice, oi.complements
FROM orders o
JOIN orderItems oi ON o.id = oi.orderId
WHERE o.establishmentId = 30001
ORDER BY o.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
